hero.art_prompt: Rahul, a 23 year old Indian graduate man in a casual collared shirt, confident and hopeful, choosing a tech career path on a laptop in a modern home, aspirational mood.

panels.narration: Rahul had a degree, but wanted a serious tech career.
panels.dialogue: I want to build real software.
panels.img_prompt: Rahul, 23, at a laptop coding simple shapes, curious and driven, modern tidy home.

panels.narration: Too many courses and unclear paths left him unsure.
panels.img_prompt: Rahul looking a little overwhelmed by many open browser options on a laptop, rubbing his head, modest room.

panels.narration: Then he found a clear, recognised online MCA.
panels.img_prompt: Rahul smiling with clarity at a laptop showing a clean MCA page with specialisations, warm bright home.

panels.narration: He picked a specialisation and started with guidance.
panels.img_prompt: Rahul confidently starting his first MCA lesson on a laptop, notebook ready, focused and happy, warm light.

turn.title: Why Start Your MCA Here
points: Choose from in-demand tech specialisations: Data Science, AI, Cloud, Cyber Security, Full Stack.
Study 100% online with weekend live classes, so you can learn while you work.
Just ₹1,60,000 for the full 2-year MCA (₹40,000/semester), with 0% interest EMI or a discount on upfront payment.
Real, hands-on tech tools and mentor support from your very first semester.

testimonials.name: Rahul Nair
testimonials.quote: I had a degree but no direction. The clear specialisations and guidance made my tech path obvious.

testimonials.name: Tanvi Shah
testimonials.quote: Picking my specialisation meant the degree matched the exact tech job I wanted.

testimonials.name: Aditya Kumar
testimonials.quote: Real, hands-on projects from semester one made me genuinely job-ready, not just certified.

testimonials.name: Pooja Reddy
testimonials.quote: A recognised MCA, learned online at my pace. It opened the first real door in tech.
